channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Former N.Y.C. Schools Chief Joel Klein Became Friendly With Epstein
item.description: Mr. Klein, who led an education technology company after running the New York City school system, met with Jeffrey Epstein over a period of several mo...

item.title: Meet the power couples of the 2026 Winter Games, from rivals to teammates
item.description: Some of these power couples span multiple sports, while others compete in the same discipline â or even on the same team.

item.title: It's a dangerous complication of pregnancy -- but a new drug holds promise
item.description: Researchers celebrate early results of a drug that may become the first treatment for a serious complication of pregnancy called preeclampsia. It's go...

item.title: 5 European nations say Alexei Navalny was poisoned and blame the Kremlin
item.description: In a joint statement, the foreign ministries of the U.K., France, Germany, Sweden and the Netherlands say Navalny was poisoned by Russia with a lethal...

item.title: After a 2-decade ban, kites fill Lahore's skies during a Pakistani springtime festival
item.description: People gathered on rooftops to enjoy flying kites for the first time in years, celebrating the spring festival of Basant. The activity had been banned...

item.title: New U.S. Boat Strike Kills 3 in the Caribbean
item.description: The attacks since early November had specifically targeted suspected drug smuggling boats in the Pacific Ocean.

item.title: Pam Bondiâs âCage Matchâ and Trumpâs Fraying Coalition
item.description: The round table reflects on a chaotic week of incompetence and meltdowns.

item.title: Department of Homeland Security Shuts Down, Though Essential Work Continues
item.description: Though funding for the department ran out early Saturday, officials said its essential functions would continue.

item.title: Opinion: Disqualified but not forgotten
item.description: A Ukrainian athlete was disqualified from competition this week by the International Olympic Committee because his helmet had images of other Ukrainia...

item.title: Navalny Was Poisoned With Frog Toxin, European Governments Say
item.description: Traces of the toxin were found in the body of the Russian dissident Aleksei A. Navalny, who died in prison two years ago, five governments said in a j...

item.title: Roy Medvedev, Soviet Era Historian and Dissident, Is Dead at 100
item.description: His score of books and hundreds of essays documented Stalinist executions, Communist repressions and censorship, and the transition to post-Soviet Rus...

item.title: Zelensky rules out holding elections until there is a cease-fire with Russia.
Navalny Was Poisoned With Frog Toxin, European Governments Say
item.description: Traces of the toxin were found in the body of the Russian dissident Aleksei A. Navalny, who died in prison two years ago, five governments said in a j...

item.title: Live Updates: In Munich, Rubio Calls Europe a Friend but Says It Must Change
item.description: European leaders expressed relief at the tone of Secretary of State Marco Rubioâs remarks, but they made it clear that the trans-Atlantic rift remaine...

item.title: After Mass Shooting, the Town of Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia Is Forever Changed
item.description: The mass shooting in the remote British Columbia mining town has shocked and saddened the nation.
